steps.title: List the solutions
steps.content:
The equation is already factored:
$$
x^2(4x-17)(4x-u)=0
$$
The solutions are
$$
0,\quad \frac{17}{4},\quad \frac{u}{4}
$$

steps.title: Use the given sum
steps.content:
The sum of the distinct solutions is $28$:
$$
0+\frac{17}{4}+\frac{u}{4}=28
$$
$$
\frac{17+u}{4}=28
$$

steps.title: Solve for u
steps.content: Multiply by $4$ and subtract $17$: $$ 17+u=112 $$ $$ u=95 $$ The answer is 95.
